title: QDRAGON Mini Basketball Hoop for Door, Indoor Basketball Hoop for Bedroom, with 3 Balls/Inflator/Breakaway Rim, Basketball Toy Gifts for Kids Boys Girls Adults
features: [ELECTRONIC SCOREBOARD WITH CHEER SOUND] - Cheer for your scoring! With 2 modes to play: ① 60S countdown ②5S countdown, add more fun and develop kid's interested in basketball. With every goal, it will cheer and count points for your kids. It brings the competition to life!

[GREAT FOR DUNKING] - Slam Dunk Like The Pros! Design with break-away rim with spring load,the maximum angle is up to 60°, which stimulates the real feeling of playing basketball. High quality steel rim make it strong enough to stand up to the most powerful dunks without bending or breaking.

[EASY TO INSTALL & FOLDABLE DESIGN] - Our mini basketball hoop for door with hook design, no drilling required. Easy to hang it over the door frame at any bedroom or office, suit for most size door. Comes with all necessary tools and clear manuals so that you could easily install a basketball hoop indoor by yourself! The steel rim has a foldable design, saves space for storage, and not affect opening and closing the door!

[HIGH QUALITY & SHOCK PROOF] - Our backboard has passed the high-strength bending test, with high toughness and strength, so there is no need to worry about breaking; the rim is made of reinforced steel material, which is wear-resistant and durable. Comes with 4 high-elastic shock-proof sponge corner pads to reduce vibration and noise when shooting, protect the door frame, don't worry about affecting your neighbors, just enjoy the baskeball time!

[IDEAL GIFT FOR KIDS & ADULTS] - QDRAGON indoor basketball hoop for bedroom is perfect for any basketball enthusiast of all ages. This mini basketball hoop turns any bedroom or office into center court in no time to offer you a funny basketball game at anytime! Comes with 3 balls, it can be a small basketball game with friends or family, start playing now!
description: QDRAGON Mini Basketball Hoop Children, Basketball Hoop Indoor Outdoor Door Hanging Basketball Board Basketball Set with 3 Balls, Net, Backboard and Air Pump for Boys Girls Children and Adults
